title: Bathroom Parameter Manifest
description: Parametric controls for COGS 160 VR Bathroom pipeline.

ceiling_height_m.description: Vertical distance from floor to ceiling.
ceiling_height_m.rationale: Ceiling height impacts psychological processing styles and perceived freedom.

lighting_warmth.description: Warmth of vanity and overhead lighting (0=Cool, 1=Warm).
lighting_warmth.rationale: Light spectrum in bathrooms directly affects morning alertness and evening melatonin.

glass_area_fraction.description: Proportion of wall area covered by mirrors or shower glass.
glass_area_fraction.rationale: Reflective and transparent surfaces alter perceived enclosure and approach-avoidance.

tile_organicism.description: Degree of natural variation in tile (0=synthetic ceramic, 1=natural stone).
tile_organicism.rationale: Biophilic architectural elements reduce physiological stress.

fixture_count.description: Number of major functional fixtures (sink, toilet, tub, shower).
fixture_count.rationale: Crowding and functional complexity influence baseline wellness perceptions.

room_volume_m3.description: Total spatial volume of the bathroom.
room_volume_m3.rationale: Spatial volume modulates baseline wellness perception; small bathrooms cue utilitarian function while larger volumes cue premium/spa contexts.
